# Brand Images

Logo assets, with tooling.

## Content

<!-- Auto-generated by scripts/update_readme_xx_stats.py START -->
| Folder | Description | Items (Unique) | SVG | PNG |
|--------|-------------|----------------:|----:|----:|
| `xx/agencies` | Logos of agencies (e.g. `ANSES`) | 5 (5) | 5 | 0 |
| `xx/brands` | Logos of brands (e.g. `Coca-Cola`) | 5190 (5069) | 873 | 263 |
| `xx/stores` | Logos of stores (e.g. `Carrefour`) | 2216 (2164) | 915 | 1296 |

## Utilities

```bash
python3 scripts/convert_images_to_png.py
python3 scripts/compress_png_images.py
python3 scripts/update_readme_xx_stats.py
```
